title: AI Agency — State & Next Steps
subtitle: SMB-tier boutique agency. Strategy locked, four demos in flight, site built but undeployed. The path to launch is gated on a small set of concrete blockers, not on more building.

items.text: Top up Anthropic balance, then rotate the exposed key
Collect founder name / photo / city / prior-role one-liner
Lead-scoring: run full eval → push repo → tune cascade volume
Resume-screening: push feat/compliance-redaction, Sonnet validation, screenshots
Booking-agent: patch 4 gaps → Phase 3 → create repo
Record a 3–5 min Loom per demo (focus each one's sharpest mechanic)
Rewrite all READMEs as sales assets, not build docs
Push all four public repos clean
Pick brand name → deploy site (Resend + Cal.com wired)
LinkedIn launch with founder bio; personal-first content sequence
Build the X strategy off the published algorithm
Swap one fictional case study for a real one; fill NA% placeholders

callout.title: Consult the published X algorithm
lines: Before drafting any X / Twitter posting strategy, mine the open-sourced recommendation algorithm. X deliberately published it — we have the real ranking logic instead of guessing.
How to apply: extract the load-bearing ranking features and translate them into concrete posting rules before locking the X content calendar.
Caveat: the snapshot is from 2023; treat it as ground truth on ranking mechanics, not current exact weights.
